competitors.raw_snapshot: 直连Claude Code CHANGELOG核实。版本从baseline记录的v2.1.215前进至v2.1.216：修复扩展会话中消息归一化导致的二次方性能退化、auto mode在OAuth token过期后误拒命令、AskUserQuestion自由文本回答行为、@-mention/vim/resume相关问题、worktree隔离与git仓库问题、后台会话daemon终止问题、非ASCII字符Bash解析、Windows网络路径访问与全屏UI渲染。另发现Claude API新增agent-memory-2026-07-22 beta header（替换managed-agents-2026-04-01），改变memory列表接口的排序/分页/path_prefix匹配行为，属技术性API版本迁移而非新功能（底层Managed Agents memory功能本身4/23已上线）。Claude Science工作台经核实为6/30-7/1既有发布，非本轮新增。anthropic.com本轮未见7/18-7/21新公告。
competitors.content_hash: 直连Claude Code CHANGELOG核实。版本从baseline记录的v2.1.215前进至v2.1.216：修复扩展会话中消息归一化导致的二次方性能退化

changes.description: Claude Code CHANGELOG新增v2.1.216，核心为性能修复（消息归一化二次方退化）与多项bug修复
changes.evidence: 「Resolved quadratic performance degradation in extended sessions with message normalization」

changes.description: Claude API memory store接口迁移至agent-memory-2026-07-22 beta header，改变列表排序/分页/路径匹配行为
changes.evidence: 「results are returned in a stable, server-defined order and the order_by and order parameters are ignored」

key_findings: v2.1.216为性能与稳定性修复，未触及meee2差异化锚点
agent-memory beta header迁移为API技术性变更，底层Managed Agents memory功能4/23已上线非本轮新功能

competitors.name: Linear
fetched_urls: https://linear.app/changelog (403，直连失败)
WebSearch: Linear app changelog new features July 20/21 2026 (ok)
WebSearch: Linear "Introducing Loops" changelog AI credits agent what is (ok)
WebSearch: Linear Loops recurring work schedule event agent instructions review (ok)
https://linear.app/changelog/2026-07-20-introducing-loops (403，直连失败，证据来自WebSearch摘要引用)
competitors.raw_snapshot: 直连403，转WebSearch。发现baseline未记录的新changelog条目：2026-07-20「Introducing Loops」——Linear Agent新增"Loops"能力，用自然语言描述一项工作，选择按schedule或按event触发运行；每次运行时Linear Agent会review自身instructions并决定下一步动作，可读取Linear自身、connected codebases、MCP servers及历次运行记录的上下文；原生运行在Linear内部，对issues/projects/documents/connected tools有完整上下文访问，同时团队可见可控；Business/Enterprise计划可用，消耗AI credits，每席位赠送$20推广额度（8/20到期）。
competitors.content_hash: 直连403，转WebSearch。发现baseline未记录的新changelog条目：2026-07-20「Introducing Loops」

changes.description: Linear Agent新增Loops：可按schedule/event触发的自主循环任务，每次运行自主review instructions、读取connected codebases/MCP servers上下文并决定下一步
changes.evidence: 「Because they operate natively inside Linear, they can work from the full context of your issues, projects, documents, and connected tools, while remaining visible and controllable by your teams」「It can draw on context from Linear, connected codebases, MCP servers, and previous runs」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：Loops具备两点与meee2锚点部分重叠——(1) agent按schedule/event自主触发运行、review自身instructions再决定下一步，与meee2锚点1（人=慢session/AI=快session的协议化运行）在"agent自主按协议推进"这一点上有结构呼应；(2) 明确读取"connected codebases, MCP servers, and previous runs"，是一种跨工具的上下文拉取，与meee2锚点4（跨session/工具/owner的artifact pull）有方向性重叠。但Loops的上下文获取仍是单向拉取供agent决策用，未见证据表明存在live link（工件双向实时同步，锚点2）或descriptive-first的flow构建（锚点3），且运行主体局限于Linear workspace内部而非人-AI在同一图内对等协作，结构重叠为部分而非全面

key_findings: Loops（7/20）为本轮Linear最具结构信号的发现，建议持续观察其"connected codebases/MCP servers"上下文拉取能力是否演化为更接近live link的形态
linear.app/changelog及具体条目页本轮均403，证据来自WebSearch多次独立查询交叉验证的官方changelog摘要引用

alerts.headline: Linear上线Loops：Agent按schedule/event自主触发，跨connected codebases/MCP servers拉取上下文并决定下一步
alerts.evidence: 「Because they operate natively inside Linear, they can work from the full context of your issues, projects, documents, and connected tools, while remaining visible and controllable by your teams」「It can draw on context from Linear, connected codebases, MCP servers, and previous runs」
alerts.action_suggestion: 持续观察Loops的跨工具上下文拉取（connected codebases/MCP servers）是否会演化为双向live link而非单向读取，以及Linear是否进一步强化人在agent决策循环中的角色定位
